Chat AI Document Indexing Sample
=================================

This is a small sample text used by the documentContext unit tests.
It contains multiple lines so the chunker can produce at least one chunk.

Section A
- Alpha line one talking about retrieval augmented generation.
- Alpha line two referencing embeddings and vector search.
- Alpha line three discussing chunk overlap heuristics.

Section B
- Beta line one about token budgets and context windows.
- Beta line two about citations and page numbers.
- Beta line three about evaluation metrics.

Section C
- Gamma line one summarising whole document queries.
- Gamma line two summarising relevant chunk selection.
- Gamma line three closing the fixture file.
